failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result by treating two prices above 233.90 as if they were below the threshold, leading to the incorrect answer that no items matched.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to identify available Mechanical Keyboards with RGB backlight costing more than $233.90. The tool was called correctly and returned two matching items, priced $272.33 and $237.48, both above $233.90. At step 4, the Executor synthesized an answer saying no items match, which directly contradicts the relevant tool output. This error was not resolved later; the Evaluator repeated the same misreading.
